title: Monday Labs Question
excerpt: How often to lab features end up not being released? And if I’m using one, would I be notified if it gets scrapped or if some features change about it?

posts.author: Lucas2 (Lucas Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: How often to lab features end up not being released? And if I’m using one, would I be notified if it gets scrapped or if some features change about it?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lucas!

We are currently looking into this for you - thank you for your continued patience. I will update you when we have confirmation from our team

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Lucas2 ,
Lab features are still under development, so it’s not uncommon for them to be scrapped or changed before they’re released to the general public. However, Monday.com tries to be as transparent as possible about the status of lab features, and they will notify users if a feature is scrapped or if there are significant changes to it.
